form.description:
The published, immutable field definition (jsonb) the applicant fills
in — null if the cohort has no published form yet.

post.summary:
POST /v1/apply/{cohort}/events — public best-effort telemetry beacon (FR-080).
The client fires `started` once, when the applicant enters their first answer.
No auth/tenant; the cohort's org is resolved under system context. Returns 204
regardless (beacon semantics — never block or leak), but rejects an unknown
event name with 422 so the client contract stays honest

get.description:
Generates PKCE state/nonce/verifier, stores them in session, and returns
the IdP authorization URL to which the client should redirect the user.

Note: Use the session() helper (not $request->session()) so OIDC handshake state
persists whether or not Sanctum's stateful middleware injected StartSession
(it is skipped on requests without an Origin/Referer header).

post.description: Validates state, delegates to CompleteLogin, and returns the user projection.

200.description:
setStatusCode(200): a JsonResource whose model wasRecentlyCreated (first OIDC
login creates the account) would otherwise auto-return 201; auth is not a create.



`AccountSessionResource`

setStatusCode(200): a JsonResource whose model wasRecentlyCreated (first OIDC
login creates the account) would otherwise auto-return 201; auth is not a create.



`AccountSessionResource`

post.description: Revokes stored tokens best-effort, destroys the session, and audits the logout.

Create a new cohort in Draft status under the given program.
Authorization is enforced in StoreCohortRequest::authorize() (program loaded
tenant-scoped; null → 403 before validation; then cohorts.manage checked).
organization_id is auto-stamped by BelongsToTenant trait.

get.description:
List the resolved tenant's cohorts for the operator Home (Story 1.5).
BelongsToTenant global scope does the isolation (AR-6) — no manual
organization_id filter. `submissions_count` drives Home's next action.
Show a single cohort. BelongsToTenant scope ensures cross-tenant ids 404.

patch.description:
Update cohort fields. Authorization is enforced in UpdateCohortRequest::authorize()
(cohort loaded tenant-scoped; null → 403; then cohorts.manage checked).

viewed.description:
`viewed` is a raw page-hit count (every public apply GET, incl.
refreshes/bots — hence "approximate" in the UI). The clamp only
guards the rare case where a `viewed` emit was swallowed
best-effort while its `started` beacon landed (viewed < started).

get.description:
Returns the local projection of the authenticated user.
No outbound HTTP call is made — this is purely from the database projection.

Fetches the general profile from StartupGate via the stored access token.
If the stored token is expired, a best-effort refresh is attempted first.

post.description:
Add a user as a member of the resolved tenant organization.
Requires members.invite OR members.manage (enforced by MembershipPolicy::create()).

get.description:
List memberships for the resolved tenant organization.
Requires members.manage permission (enforced by MembershipPolicy::viewAny()).

post.summary:
POST /api/v1/auth/register
Creates a native account, issues a session (unverified), sends verification

POST /api/v1/auth/password/login
Enumeration-safe: unknown email and wrong password return the SAME 422

message.const: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

get.summary:
GET /api/v1/auth/email/verify/{id}/{hash}  (signed)
Validates the signed link, marks the email verified, redirects to the SPA

post.description:
Create a new organization. The authenticated user becomes the owner.
No tenant context is set at this point — CreateOrganization handles that.

get.description:
List organizations the authenticated user has an active membership in.
Platform admins see all organizations.

Show a single organization. The tenant middleware already verified active membership.
OrganizationPolicy::view() always returns true — membership = permission to view.

patch.description:
Update organization name and/or branding.
Requires organizations.manage permission (enforced by OrganizationPolicy::update()).

get.description:
List all programs for the resolved tenant.
BelongsToTenant global scope applies automatically.

post.description:
Create a new program in Draft status.
organization_id is auto-stamped by BelongsToTenant trait.

get.description: Show a single program. BelongsToTenant scope ensures cross-tenant ids 404.

patch.description:
Update program name, description, and/or settings.
Programs are NOT immutable — PATCH works on Published programs too.

post.description:
Transition the program to Published status.
Requires programs.publish permission.

Deep-copy a program into a new DRAFT program.
Requires programs.manage permission.

get.description:
List all policies for the resolved tenant's program.
BelongsToTenant scope on Program ensures cross-tenant program IDs 404.

post.description:
Set a policy key/value on the program.
Duplicate key for same program → 422 via FormRequest Rule::unique.

get.description: List all role requirements for the resolved tenant's program.

post.description: Create a role requirement on the program.

Save an existing program as a reusable template.
Reuses programs.manage permission (checked via 'create' gate on Program).

Materialize a new DRAFT program from a template blueprint.

Uses an explicit tenant-scoped lookup rather than implicit route model binding
because SubstituteBindings runs before the 'tenant' middleware in the API group,
meaning BelongsToTenant scope is not yet active when bindings resolve.
Cross-tenant template ids → 404 via BelongsToTenant scope on the explicit query.

get.description: List all stages for a program, ordered by order_index.

post.description: Create a new stage + an initial draft version.
Reorder stages by providing all stage ids in the desired order.

patch.description:
Update the stage name/parallel_group and/or current draft version's config.
If the current draft has already been published, attempting to update config → 422.

post.description: Publish the stage's current draft version.

message.const: No draft version found to publish.

prefixItems.const: This stage has no draft version to publish.

get.description:
List all prerequisite dependencies for a stage.
BelongsToTenant global scope ensures cross-tenant program/stage → 404.

post.description:
Add a prerequisite dependency to a stage.
Rejects self-edges, cross-program edges, and cycles with 422.

delete.description:
Remove a stage dependency.
BelongsToTenant global scope ensures cross-tenant ids 404.

path.description: Base path for paginator generated URLs.

per_page.description: Number of items shown per page.

to.description: Number of the last item in the slice.

total.description: Total number of items being paginated.

get.description:
List all tracks for a program. BelongsToTenant scope on Program ensures
cross-tenant {program} ids result in findOrFail throwing 404.

post.description:
Create a new track under a program.
organization_id is auto-stamped by BelongsToTenant creating hook.

patch.description:
Update a track's name, description, and/or order_index.
BelongsToTenant global scope on Track ensures cross-tenant ids 404.

delete.description:
Delete a track (and cascade — see DeleteTrack service for Tasks 4/5 extensions).
BelongsToTenant global scope on Track ensures cross-tenant ids 404.

submissions_count.description: Present only on the list (withCount); never null on show/store.

SubmitApplicationRequest.description:
Validates a public application submit (Story 2.7). The Idempotency-Key arrives
as a header; it is merged into the input so a missing key returns a clean 422
with field details rather than a 500. Files are type/size-guarded pre-store.

files.description:
Cap the file COUNT, not just per-file size: getContent() loads every
upload into memory at once, so an uncapped array could exhaust the
worker. 20 files at the per-file ceiling is a generous application.

SubmitApplicationRequest.title: SubmitApplicationRequest

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
